; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
               OpCapability Shader
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %in_worldPos %in_normal %in_uv %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
               OpSource GLSL 450

%glslstd450     = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; Input decorations
               OpDecorate %in_worldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %in_normal Location 1
               OpDecorate %in_uv Location 2

; Output decoration
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; UBO decorations
               OpDecorate %UBO_type Block
               OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
               OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 0 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 0 MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 0 Offset 0
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 1 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 1 MatrixStride 16

               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 2 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 2 MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 2 Offset 128
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 3 Offset 192
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 4 Offset 208
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO_type 5 Offset 224

; === Types ===
%void           = OpTypeVoid
%func_type      = OpTypeFunction %void
%float          = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float        = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float        = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float        = OpTypeVector %float 4
%bool           = OpTypeBool
%int            = OpTypeInt 32 1
%mat4           = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

; UBO struct: model, view, projection, lightPos, cameraPos, params
%UBO_type       = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float

; Pointer types
%ptr_input_v3float   = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_input_v2float   = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_output_v4float  = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_uniform_UBO     = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO_type
%ptr_uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; === Constants ===
%float_0        = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_01       = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_03       = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_05       = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_07       = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_08       = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_1        = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_6        = OpConstant %float 6.0
%int_3          = OpConstant %int 3

%v2const_05     = OpConstantComposite %v2float %float_05 %float_05
%v3const_yellow = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1 %float_08 %float_0
%v3const_blue   = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_01 %float_01 %float_03

; === Variables ===
%in_worldPos    = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3float Input
%in_normal      = OpVariable %ptr_input_v3float Input
%in_uv          = OpVariable %ptr_input_v2float Input
%outColor       = OpVariable %ptr_output_v4float Output
%ubo            = OpVariable %ptr_uniform_UBO Uniform

; === Main function ===
%main           = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%entry          = OpLabel

; Load UV coordinates
%uv             = OpLoad %v2float %in_uv

; Scale to 6x6 grid and take fract for cell-local position
%uv_scaled      = OpVectorTimesScalar %v2float %uv %float_6
%uv_fract       = OpExtInst %v2float %glslstd450 Fract %uv_scaled

; Center each cell so dot center is at (0.5, 0.5)
%uv_centered    = OpFSub %v2float %uv_fract %v2const_05

; Compute Euclidean distance from cell center
%c_x            = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_centered 0
%c_y            = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_centered 1
%c_x2           = OpFMul %float %c_x %c_x
%c_y2           = OpFMul %float %c_y %c_y
%dist2          = OpFAdd %float %c_x2 %c_y2
%dist           = OpExtInst %float %glslstd450 Sqrt %dist2

; Test if fragment is inside a dot (radius 0.3)
%is_dot         = OpFOrdLessThanEqual %bool %dist %float_03

; Select pattern color: yellow dot or dark blue background
%base_color     = OpSelect %v3float %is_dot %v3const_yellow %v3const_blue

; --- Lambertian shading ---
; Load world-space position
%worldPos       = OpLoad %v3float %in_worldPos

; Load and normalize world-space normal
%normal_raw     = OpLoad %v3float %in_normal
%N              = OpExtInst %v3float %glslstd450 Normalize %normal_raw

; Load light position from UBO member 3 (lightPos)
%lightPos_ptr   = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_v4float %ubo %int_3
%lightPos       = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
%L_pos          = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos %lightPos 0 1 2

; Compute light direction and normalize
%to_light       = OpFSub %v3float %L_pos %worldPos
%L              = OpExtInst %v3float %glslstd450 Normalize %to_light

; Diffuse term: max(dot(N, L), 0.0)
%NdotL          = OpDot %float %N %L
%diffuse        = OpExtInst %float %glslstd450 FMax %NdotL %float_0

; Combined shading factor: 0.3 + 0.7 * diffuse
%scaled_diff    = OpFMul %float %float_07 %diffuse
%shade          = OpFAdd %float %float_03 %scaled_diff

; Apply shading to pattern color
%shaded_color   = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %base_color %shade

; Construct final RGBA output with alpha = 1.0
%output         = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %shaded_color %float_1
               OpStore %outColor %output

               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Hemisphere Lighting

View SPIR-V (4548 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
               OpCapability Shader
        %glsl450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %inPos %inNormal %inUV %inTangent %inColor %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; ----- Input Locations -----
               OpDecorate %inPos    Location 0
               OpDecorate %inNormal Location 1
               OpDecorate %inUV     Location 2
               OpDecorate %inTangent Location 3
               OpDecorate %inColor  Location 4

; ----- Output Location -----
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; ----- Uniform Buffer (UBO) -----
               OpDecorate %_UBO     DescriptorSet 0
               OpDecorate %_UBO     Binding 0
               OpDecorate %UboType  Block
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 0 Offset 0
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 1 Offset 64
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 2 Offset 128
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 3 Offset 192
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 4 Offset 208
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 5 Offset 224
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 0 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 0 MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 1 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 1 MatrixStride 16
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 2 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UboType 2 MatrixStride 16

; ==================== Types ====================
%void       = OpTypeVoid
%float      = OpTypeFloat 32
%uint       = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v2float    = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float    = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float    = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4       = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%UboType    = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float

%ptrInV3    = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptrInV2    = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptrOutV4   = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptrUbo     = OpTypePointer Uniform %UboType
%ptrUboV4   = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%fnType     = OpTypeFunction %void

; ==================== Constants ====================
%c0         = OpConstant %float 0
%c005       = OpConstant %float 0.05
%c015       = OpConstant %float 0.15
%c03        = OpConstant %float 0.3
%c04        = OpConstant %float 0.4
%c05        = OpConstant %float 0.5
%c06        = OpConstant %float 0.6
%c1         = OpConstant %float 1

%cGround    = OpConstantComposite %v3float %c03 %c015 %c005
%cSky       = OpConstantComposite %v3float %c04 %c06 %c1

%i3         = OpConstant %uint 3

; ==================== Variables ====================
%inPos      = OpVariable %ptrInV3 Input
%inNormal   = OpVariable %ptrInV3 Input
%inUV       = OpVariable %ptrInV2 Input
%inTangent  = OpVariable %ptrInV3 Input
%inColor    = OpVariable %ptrInV3 Input
%outColor   = OpVariable %ptrOutV4 Output
%_UBO       = OpVariable %ptrUbo Uniform

; ==================== Main ====================
%main       = OpFunction %void None %fnType
%entry      = OpLabel

; --- Normalize the interpolated normal ---
%rawN       = OpLoad %v3float %inNormal
%N          = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl450 Normalize %rawN

; --- Hemisphere blend factor: N.y * 0.5 + 0.5 ---
%Ny         = OpCompositeExtract %float %N 1
%halfNy     = OpFMul %float %Ny %c05
%blend      = OpFAdd %float %halfNy %c05
%invBlend   = OpFSub %float %c1 %blend

; --- Hemisphere ambient = groundColor*(1-blend) + skyColor*blend ---
%gndMix     = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %cGround %invBlend
%skyMix     = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %cSky    %blend
%ambient    = OpFAdd %v3float %gndMix %skyMix

; --- Diffuse term: 0.3 * max(dot(N, L), 0.0) ---
%wPos       = OpLoad %v3float %inPos
%lpPtr      = OpAccessChain %ptrUboV4 %_UBO %i3
%lp4        = OpLoad %v4float %lpPtr
%lp3        = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lp4 %lp4 0 1 2
%toLight    = OpFSub %v3float %lp3 %wPos
%L          = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl450 Normalize %toLight
%NdotL      = OpDot %float %N %L
%d          = OpExtInst %float %glsl450 FMax %NdotL %c0
%diffS      = OpFMul %float %c03 %d
%diffV      = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %diffS %diffS %diffS

; --- Final color = ambient + diffuse, alpha = 1.0 ---
%rgb        = OpFAdd %v3float %ambient %diffV
%r          = OpCompositeExtract %float %rgb 0
%g          = OpCompositeExtract %float %rgb 1
%b          = OpCompositeExtract %float %rgb 2
%rgba       = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %r %g %b %c1

               OpStore %outColor %rgba
               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Y-Gradient

View SPIR-V (1592 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
OpCapability Shader
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %vec4
%fn_type = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%c0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%c0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%c0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%c0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%c1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%c_bottom = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %c0_1 %c0_4 %c0_1
%c_top = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %c1_0 %c1_0 %c1_0

; Variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3 Input
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v4 Output

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %fn_type
%entry = OpLabel
  %wp = OpLoad %vec3 %worldPos
  %y = OpCompositeExtract %float %wp 1
  %y_half = OpFMul %float %y %c0_5
  %t = OpFAdd %float %y_half %c0_5
  %t_clamped = OpExtInst %float %1 FClamp %t %c0 %c1_0
  %one_minus_t = OpFSub %float %c1_0 %t_clamped
  %bot_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %c_bottom %one_minus_t
  %top_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %c_top %t_clamped
  %mixed = OpFAdd %vec3 %bot_scaled %top_scaled
  %r = OpCompositeExtract %float %mixed 0
  %g = OpCompositeExtract %float %mixed 1
  %b = OpCompositeExtract %float %mixed 2
  %result = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %r %g %b %c1_0
  OpStore %outColor %result
  OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
               OpCapability Shader
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
               OpSource GLSL 450

               OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %normal Location 1
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
               OpDecorate %UBO Block

               OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

%void       = OpTypeVoid
%func       = OpTypeFunction %void
%float      = OpTypeFloat 32
%int        = OpTypeInt 32 1
%vec3       = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4       = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4       = OpTypeMatrix %vec4 4
%UBO        = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %vec4 %vec4 %vec4
%ptr_in_v3  = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %vec4
%ptr_uni    = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_uni_v4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %vec4

%c0         = OpConstant %float 0.0
%c03        = OpConstant %float 0.3
%c07        = OpConstant %float 0.7
%c1         = OpConstant %float 1.0
%c15        = OpConstant %float 1.5
%c3f        = OpConstant %float 3.0
%c08        = OpConstant %float 0.8
%c02        = OpConstant %float 0.2
%int_3      = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4      = OpConstant %int 4

%cBaseColor = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %c08 %c02 %c02
%cFogColor  = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %c07 %c07 %c08

%worldPos   = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3 Input
%normal     = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3 Input
%outColor   = OpVariable %ptr_out_v4 Output
%ubo        = OpVariable %ptr_uni Uniform

%main       = OpFunction %void None %func
%entry      = OpLabel

%wp         = OpLoad %vec3 %worldPos
%n          = OpLoad %vec3 %normal
%n_norm     = OpExtInst %vec3 %1 Normalize %n

%lightPtr   = OpAccessChain %ptr_uni_v4 %ubo %int_3
%camPtr     = OpAccessChain %ptr_uni_v4 %ubo %int_4
%light      = OpLoad %vec4 %lightPtr
%cam        = OpLoad %vec4 %camPtr

%light_xyz  = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %light %light 0 1 2
%cam_xyz    = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %cam %cam 0 1 2

%toLight    = OpFSub %vec3 %light_xyz %wp
%ldir       = OpExtInst %vec3 %1 Normalize %toLight
%diff       = OpDot %float %n_norm %ldir
%diff_c     = OpExtInst %float %1 FClamp %diff %c0 %c1

%factor_mul = OpFMul %float %c07 %diff_c
%factor     = OpFAdd %float %c03 %factor_mul

%litColor   = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %cBaseColor %factor

%dist_val   = OpExtInst %float %1 Distance %cam_xyz %wp

%fog_num    = OpFSub %float %dist_val %c15
%fog_div    = OpFDiv %float %fog_num %c3f
%fog_fac    = OpExtInst %float %1 FClamp %fog_div %c0 %c1

%one_minus  = OpFSub %float %c1 %fog_fac
%lit_w      = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %litColor %one_minus
%fog_w      = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %cFogColor %fog_fac
%fogged     = OpFAdd %vec3 %lit_w %fog_w

%r          = OpCompositeExtract %float %fogged 0
%g          = OpCompositeExtract %float %fogged 1
%b          = OpCompositeExtract %float %fogged 2
%result     = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %r %g %b %c1

               OpStore %outColor %result
               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

View SPIR-V (3177 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
               OpCapability Shader
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
               OpSource GLSL 450

; Decorations
               OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %normal Location 1
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
               OpDecorate %UBO Block
               OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
               OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Types and constants
       %void = OpTypeVoid
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
        %int = OpTypeInt 32 1
    %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
   %mat4v4f = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

       %UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4v4f %mat4v4f %mat4v4f %v4float %v4float %v4float

%ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
 %ptr_ubo   = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_ubo_v4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

  %func_ty  = OpTypeFunction %void

       %f0   = OpConstant %float 0
      %f05   = OpConstant %float 0.5
       %f1   = OpConstant %float 1
      %f02   = OpConstant %float 0.2
      %f04   = OpConstant %float 0.4
      %f07   = OpConstant %float 0.7
     %f075   = OpConstant %float 0.75
        %i3  = OpConstant %int 3

      %cool  = OpConstantComposite %v3float %f02 %f02 %f075
      %warm  = OpConstantComposite %v3float %f07 %f07 %f04

; Variables
  %worldPos  = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3 Input
    %normal  = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3 Input
   %outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v4 Output
       %ubo  = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform

; Main function
       %main = OpFunction %void None %func_ty
      %entry = OpLabel

; Load inputs
      %N_in = OpLoad %v3float %normal
         %P = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos

; Normalize normal
         %N = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %N_in

; Load lightPos from UBO (member 3)
  %lightPtr = OpAccessChain %ptr_ubo_v4 %ubo %i3
 %lightPos4 = OpLoad %v4float %lightPtr
  %lightPos = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos4 %lightPos4 0 1 2

; Light direction L = normalize(lightPos - worldPos)
     %L_vec = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos %P
         %L = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %L_vec

; t = dot(N, L) * 0.5 + 0.5
       %NdL = OpDot %float %N %L
   %NdL_half = OpFMul %float %NdL %f05
         %t = OpFAdd %float %NdL_half %f05

; color = mix(cool, warm, t) = cool*(1-t) + warm*t
 %one_minus_t = OpFSub %float %f1 %t
 %cool_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %cool %one_minus_t
 %warm_scaled = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %warm %t
     %color3 = OpFAdd %v3float %cool_scaled %warm_scaled

; Output vec4(color, 1.0)
     %color4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %color3 %f1
              OpStore %outColor %color4

              OpReturn
              OpFunctionEnd

OpName %main "main"

SPIR-V Shader - Mandelbrot Set

View SPIR-V (2946 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %in_uv %out_color
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

OpDecorate %in_uv Location 2
OpDecorate %out_color Location 0

OpName %main "main"

; Types
%void    = OpTypeVoid
%bool    = OpTypeBool
%f32     = OpTypeFloat 32
%u32     = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v2f     = OpTypeVector %f32 2
%v4f     = OpTypeVector %f32 4
%fn_type = OpTypeFunction %void
%ptr_in  = OpTypePointer Input %v2f
%ptr_out = OpTypePointer Output %v4f

; Float constants
%f0     = OpConstant %f32 0.0
%f0_5   = OpConstant %f32 0.5
%f1     = OpConstant %f32 1.0
%f2     = OpConstant %f32 2.0
%f3     = OpConstant %f32 3.0
%f4     = OpConstant %f32 4.0
%f20    = OpConstant %f32 20.0

; Integer constants
%i0     = OpConstant %u32 0
%i1     = OpConstant %u32 1
%i20    = OpConstant %u32 20

; Interface variables
%in_uv     = OpVariable %ptr_in  Input
%out_color = OpVariable %ptr_out Output

; ===== main =====
%main = OpFunction %void None %fn_type

%entry = OpLabel
  %uv_val   = OpLoad %v2f %in_uv
  %u        = OpCompositeExtract %f32 %uv_val 0
  %tex_v    = OpCompositeExtract %f32 %uv_val 1

  ; c = (u*3 - 2, v*2 - 1)
  %u3       = OpFMul %f32 %u     %f3
  %c_re     = OpFSub %f32 %u3    %f2
  %v2       = OpFMul %f32 %tex_v %f2
  %c_im     = OpFSub %f32 %v2    %f1

  OpBranch %loop_header

; --------------- loop header ---------------
%loop_header = OpLabel
  %iter      = OpPhi %u32 %i0      %entry         %iter_next %loop_continue
  %zr        = OpPhi %f32 %f0      %entry         %zr_next   %loop_continue
  %zi        = OpPhi %f32 %f0      %entry         %zi_next   %loop_continue
  OpLoopMerge %loop_merge %loop_continue None
  %cmp       = OpULessThan %bool %iter %i20
  OpBranchConditional %cmp %loop_body %loop_merge

; --------------- loop body ---------------
%loop_body = OpLabel
  ; z = z*z + c
  %zr2       = OpFMul %f32 %zr  %zr
  %zi2       = OpFMul %f32 %zi  %zi
  %zrzi      = OpFMul %f32 %zr  %zi
  %diff      = OpFSub %f32 %zr2 %zi2
  %zr_next   = OpFAdd %f32 %diff    %c_re
  %two_zrzi  = OpFMul %f32 %zrzi    %f2
  %zi_next   = OpFAdd %f32 %two_zrzi %c_im

  ; escape test: |z_new|^2 > 4
  %zr_next2  = OpFMul %f32 %zr_next %zr_next
  %zi_next2  = OpFMul %f32 %zi_next %zi_next
  %mag_sq    = OpFAdd %f32 %zr_next2 %zi_next2
  %escaped   = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %mag_sq %f4

  OpBranchConditional %escaped %loop_merge %loop_continue

; --------------- loop continue ---------------
%loop_continue = OpLabel
  %iter_next = OpIAdd %u32 %iter %i1
  OpBranch %loop_header

; --------------- loop merge ---------------
%loop_merge = OpLabel
  ; t = iterations / 20
  %iter_f = OpConvertUToF %f32 %iter
  %t      = OpFDiv %f32 %iter_f %f20

  ; color = (t, t*0.5, 1.0 - t, 1.0)
  %g      = OpFMul %f32 %t   %f0_5
  %b      = OpFSub %f32 %f1  %t
  %color  = OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %t %g %b %f1

  OpStore %out_color %color
  OpReturn

OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
OpCapability Shader
%glsl = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %uv %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%bool = OpTypeBool
%vec2 = OpTypeVector %float 2
%vec3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%vec4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %vec4 4
%functy = OpTypeFunction %void
%v3ptr_input = OpTypePointer Input %vec3
%v2ptr_input = OpTypePointer Input %vec2
%v4ptr_output = OpTypePointer Output %vec4
%v4ptr_uniform = OpTypePointer Uniform %vec4
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %vec4 %vec4 %vec4
%uboptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

%worldPos = OpVariable %v3ptr_input Input
%normal = OpVariable %v3ptr_input Input
%uv = OpVariable %v2ptr_input Input
%outColor = OpVariable %v4ptr_output Output
%ubo = OpVariable %uboptr Uniform

%c0 = OpConstant %float 0
%c0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%c0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%c0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%c0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%c0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%c0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%c0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%c1 = OpConstant %float 1
%c8 = OpConstant %float 8
%c16 = OpConstant %float 16
%i3 = OpConstant %int 3
%cmortar = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %c0_7 %c0_7 %c0_7
%cbrick = OpConstantComposite %vec3 %c0_7 %c0_2 %c0_1

%main = OpFunction %void None %functy
%entry = OpLabel

; Scale UV by (8, 16)
%uv_val = OpLoad %vec2 %uv
%scale_vec = OpCompositeConstruct %vec2 %c8 %c16
%scaled_uv = OpFMul %vec2 %uv_val %scale_vec
%su = OpCompositeExtract %float %scaled_uv 0
%sv = OpCompositeExtract %float %scaled_uv 1

; Compute row and check odd for stagger
%row = OpExtInst %float %glsl Floor %sv
%row_half = OpFMul %float %row %c0_5
%row_fract = OpExtInst %float %glsl Fract %row_half
%is_odd = OpFOrdGreaterThanEqual %bool %row_fract %c0_5

; Apply half-brick offset on odd rows
%offset = OpSelect %float %is_odd %c0_5 %c0
%su_shifted = OpFAdd %float %su %offset

; Fractional position within brick cell
%fu = OpExtInst %float %glsl Fract %su_shifted
%fv = OpExtInst %float %glsl Fract %sv

; Mortar test: within mortar thickness in X or Y
%mortar_x = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %fu %c0_05
%mortar_y = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %fv %c0_1
%is_mortar = OpLogicalOr %bool %mortar_x %mortar_y

; Select brick or mortar color
%base_color = OpSelect %vec3 %is_mortar %cmortar %cbrick

; Lambertian shading
%n_val = OpLoad %vec3 %normal
%N = OpExtInst %vec3 %glsl Normalize %n_val
%P = OpLoad %vec3 %worldPos

; Load light position from UBO member 3
%light_ptr = OpAccessChain %v4ptr_uniform %ubo %i3
%light_pos = OpLoad %vec4 %light_ptr
%L_pos = OpVectorShuffle %vec3 %light_pos %light_pos 0 1 2

; Light direction and diffuse
%diff_vec = OpFSub %vec3 %L_pos %P
%L = OpExtInst %vec3 %glsl Normalize %diff_vec
%ndotl = OpDot %float %N %L
%diffuse = OpExtInst %float %glsl FMax %ndotl %c0

; Shading factor: 0.4 + 0.6 * diffuse
%scaled_diff = OpFMul %float %c0_6 %diffuse
%shading = OpFAdd %float %c0_4 %scaled_diff

; Final color = base_color * shading, alpha = 1.0
%final_rgb = OpVectorTimesScalar %vec3 %base_color %shading
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %vec4 %final_rgb %c1
OpStore %outColor %final_color

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

SPIR-V Shader - Fresnel Heatmap

View SPIR-V (4313 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
               OpCapability Shader
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %inWorldPos %inNormal %inUV %inTangent %inColor %outColor %ubo
               OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Source info
               OpSource GLSL 450
               OpName %main "main"
               OpName %inWorldPos "worldPos"
               OpName %inNormal "normal"
               OpName %inUV "uv"
               OpName %inTangent "tangent"
               OpName %inColor "color"
               OpName %outColor "outColor"
               OpName %ubo "ubo"
               OpName %UBO "UBO"

; Input locations
               OpDecorate %inWorldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %inNormal Location 1
               OpDecorate %inUV Location 2
               OpDecorate %inTangent Location 3
               OpDecorate %inColor Location 4

; Output location
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; UBO block decorations
               OpDecorate %UBO Block
               OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
               OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 ColMajor
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
               OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

; ========== Types ==========
%void       = OpTypeVoid
%fnTy       = OpTypeFunction %void
%f32        = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3f        = OpTypeVector %f32 3
%v4f        = OpTypeVector %f32 4
%bool       = OpTypeBool
%mat4v4     = OpTypeMatrix %v4f 4
%i32        = OpTypeInt 32 0

; Pointer types
%pInV3      = OpTypePointer Input %v3f
%pOutV4     = OpTypePointer Output %v4f
%pUniformV4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4f

; UBO struct type (std140)
%UBO        = OpTypeStruct %mat4v4 %mat4v4 %mat4v4 %v4f %v4f %v4f
%pUBO       = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

; ========== Constants ==========
%cZero      = OpConstant %f32 0.0
%cHalf      = OpConstant %f32 0.5
%cOne       = OpConstant %f32 1.0
%cTwo       = OpConstant %f32 2.0
%cIdx4      = OpConstant %i32 4

; ========== Variables ==========
%inWorldPos = OpVariable %pInV3 Input
%inNormal   = OpVariable %pInV3 Input
%inUV       = OpVariable %pInV3 Input
%inTangent  = OpVariable %pInV3 Input
%inColor    = OpVariable %pInV3 Input
%outColor   = OpVariable %pOutV4 Output
%ubo        = OpVariable %pUBO Uniform

; ========== Main Function ==========
%main       = OpFunction %void None %fnTy
%entry      = OpLabel

; Load interpolated world-space normal and normalize it
%N_raw      = OpLoad %v3f %inNormal
%N          = OpExtInst %v3f %1 Normalize %N_raw

; Load world-space position
%P          = OpLoad %v3f %inWorldPos

; Access cameraPos (member index 4) from UBO
%camPtr     = OpAccessChain %pUniformV4 %ubo %cIdx4
%camRaw     = OpLoad %v4f %camPtr
%camXYZ     = OpVectorShuffle %v3f %camRaw %camRaw 0 1 2

; Compute view direction V = normalize(cameraPos - worldPos)
%V_unnorm   = OpFSub %v3f %camXYZ %P
%V          = OpExtInst %v3f %1 Normalize %V_unnorm

; NdotV = max(dot(N, V), 0.0)
%NdotV_raw  = OpDot %f32 %N %V
%NdotV      = OpExtInst %f32 %1 FMax %NdotV_raw %cZero

; Compare: NdotV < 0.5
%cmp        = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %NdotV %cHalf

; --- Branch 1 (NdotV < 0.5): r=1, g=2*NdotV, b=0 ---
%g_low      = OpFMul %f32 %cTwo %NdotV        ; 2 * NdotV

; --- Branch 2 (NdotV >= 0.5): r=g=1-2*(NdotV-0.5), b=2*(NdotV-0.5) ---
%temp       = OpFSub %f32 %NdotV %cHalf        ; NdotV - 0.5
%twoTemp    = OpFMul %f32 %cTwo %temp           ; 2 * (NdotV - 0.5)
%rg_high    = OpFSub %f32 %cOne %twoTemp        ; 1 - 2*(NdotV - 0.5)

; Select per-component based on comparison
%r          = OpSelect %f32 %cmp %cOne %rg_high  ; 1.0 or 1-2t
%g          = OpSelect %f32 %cmp %g_low %rg_high ; 2*NdotV or 1-2t
%b          = OpSelect %f32 %cmp %cZero %twoTemp ; 0.0 or 2t

; Construct final RGBA output
%rgba       = OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %r %g %b %cOne
               OpStore %outColor %rgba

               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Full Phong Model

View SPIR-V (3530 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
OpCapability Shader
%glsl450 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %inPos %inNormal %inUV %inTangent %inColor %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

OpDecorate %inPos Location 0
OpDecorate %inNormal Location 1
OpDecorate %inUV Location 2
OpDecorate %inTangent Location 3
OpDecorate %inColor Location 4
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224

; Types
%void    = OpTypeVoid
%bool    = OpTypeBool
%i32     = OpTypeInt 32 1
%f32     = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2f     = OpTypeVector %f32 2
%v3f     = OpTypeVector %f32 3
%v4f     = OpTypeVector %f32 4
%m4f     = OpTypeMatrix %v4f 4
%UBO     = OpTypeStruct %m4f %m4f %m4f %v4f %v4f %v4f
%pInV3   = OpTypePointer Input %v3f
%pInV2   = OpTypePointer Input %v2f
%pOutV4  = OpTypePointer Output %v4f
%pUnUBO  = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%pUnV4   = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4f
%fnty    = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%c0      = OpConstant %f32 0
%c1      = OpConstant %f32 1
%c32     = OpConstant %f32 32
%ca_r    = OpConstant %f32 0.1
%ca_g    = OpConstant %f32 0.05
%ca_b    = OpConstant %f32 0.05
%ambient = OpConstantComposite %v3f %ca_r %ca_g %ca_b
%white3  = OpConstantComposite %v3f %c1 %c1 %c1
%ci0     = OpConstant %i32 0
%ci3     = OpConstant %i32 3
%ci4     = OpConstant %i32 4

; Variables
%inPos    = OpVariable %pInV3 Input
%inNormal = OpVariable %pInV3 Input
%inUV     = OpVariable %pInV2 Input
%inTangent= OpVariable %pInV3 Input
%inColor  = OpVariable %pInV3 Input
%outColor = OpVariable %pOutV4 Output
%ubo      = OpVariable %pUnUBO Uniform

; Function
%main = OpFunction %void None %fnty
%bb   = OpLabel

; --- Load inputs ---
%worldPos    = OpLoad %v3f %inPos
%normalRaw   = OpLoad %v3f %inNormal
%vertexColor = OpLoad %v3f %inColor

; --- Normalize interpolated normal ---
%N = OpExtInst %v3f %glsl450 Normalize %normalRaw

; --- Load lightPos and cameraPos from UBO ---
%lpPtr = OpAccessChain %pUnV4 %ubo %ci3
%cpPtr = OpAccessChain %pUnV4 %ubo %ci4
%lp    = OpLoad %v4f %lpPtr
%cp    = OpLoad %v4f %cpPtr

; xyz swizzle
%lp3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3f %lp %lp 0 1 2
%cp3 = OpVectorShuffle %v3f %cp %cp 0 1 2

; --- Light vector L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - worldPos) ---
%toLight = OpFSub %v3f %lp3 %worldPos
%L       = OpExtInst %v3f %glsl450 Normalize %toLight

; --- Diffuse: vertexColor * max(dot(N, L), 0) ---
%NdL        = OpDot %f32 %N %L
%NdL_clamp  = OpExtInst %f32 %glsl450 FMax %NdL %c0
%diffuse    = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3f %vertexColor %NdL_clamp

; --- Specular: reflect(-L, N), view V = normalize(camPos.xyz - worldPos) ---
%negL   = OpFNegate %v3f %L
%R      = OpExtInst %v3f %glsl450 Reflect %negL %N

%toView = OpFSub %v3f %cp3 %worldPos
%V      = OpExtInst %v3f %glsl450 Normalize %toView

%RdV        = OpDot %f32 %R %V
%RdV_clamp  = OpExtInst %f32 %glsl450 FMax %RdV %c0
%specPow    = OpExtInst %f32 %glsl450 Pow %RdV_clamp %c32
%specular   = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3f %white3 %specPow

; --- Combine: ambient + diffuse + specular, clamp [0,1], alpha=1 ---
%sum1  = OpFAdd %v3f %ambient %diffuse
%sum2  = OpFAdd %v3f %sum1 %specular
%rgb   = OpExtInst %v3f %glsl450 FClamp %sum2 %c0 %c1
%final = OpCompositeConstruct %v4f %rgb %c1

OpStore %outColor %final
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Test 42: Geometry Shaders (SPIR-V Assembly) Score: 0.00 / 15
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a SPIR-V assembly geometry shader. It will be assembled with
spirv-as (Vulkan 1.0) and rendered using a fixed vertex shader and fragment shader.

**Geometry shader requirements:**
- `OpCapability Geometry`
- `OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450`
- `OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main"` listing ALL interface variables
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (InputPoints/InputLines/Triangles/InputLinesAdjacency/InputTrianglesAdjacency)
- `OpExecutionMode %main ` (OutputPoints/OutputLineStrip/OutputTriangleStrip)
- `OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices ` (max vertices emitted)
- `OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1`

**Input from vertex shader (per-vertex arrays):**
The input gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block (must be decorated with Block + BuiltIn Position).
```
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
; Array size depends on input primitive:
; InputPoints: 1, InputLines: 2, Triangles: 3
; InputLinesAdjacency: 4, InputTrianglesAdjacency: 6
%arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_N
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
; Access: OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_i %int_0 -> gl_in[i].gl_Position
```

User-defined inputs are also arrays of the same size:
```
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos[]; ; positions in clip space
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal[]; ; vertex normals
layout(location = 2) in vec3 color[]; ; per-vertex colors
```

**Output (per emitted vertex):**
The output gl_Position is in a gl_PerVertex block:
```
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
; Store: OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0 -> gl_out.gl_Position
```
```
layout(location = 0) out vec3 outColor; ; color for fragment shader
```

**Emit vertices with:** `OpEmitVertex` after storing gl_Position and outColor.
**End primitive with:** `OpEndPrimitive` after emitting a complete strip.

**Available UBO (set=0, binding=0) - accessible from geometry shader:**
Same layout as test 41 (model/view/proj matrices, lightPos, cameraPos, params).

**Write ONLY the complete SPIR-V assembly text for the geometry shader.**


**Input primitive:** InputPoints (1 vertex per invocation, array size 1)
**Geometry:** 25 colored points in a 5x5 grid spread across [-0.8, 0.8].

**Task:** Expand each point into a small colored quad (4 vertices as triangle strip).
1. Read gl_in[0].gl_Position (the point position).
2. Read color[0] (the point's color).
3. Define a half-size: h = 0.04.
4. Emit 4 vertices forming a quad centered on the point:
- (x-h, y-h), (x+h, y-h), (x-h, y+h), (x+h, y+h)
- All with z=0, w=1, and the same color.
5. Output as triangle strip, max 4 vertices.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Write GPU geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly. Geometry shaders receive primitives (points, lines, or triangles) and can output completely new geometry — for example, turning a single point into a billboard quad or a thin line into a thick ribbon.

Each subpass specifies a different input primitive type and a transformation task. The rendered output is compared pixel-by-pixel against a reference image. Writing geometry shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly requires precise control of vertex emission and primitive topology.

 0.0000
[Points to Quads] SPIR-V validation failed: error: line 55: ID '39[%39]' has not been defined
%40 = OpAccessChain %39 %6 %int_0

Geometry Shader - Points to Quads (points)

View SPIR-V (3746 chars)
; SPIR-V 1.0 — Geometry Shader: point-to-quad expansion
;              InputPoints → OutputTriangleStrip, 4 vertices max
OpCapability Shader
OpCapability Geometry
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos %normal %color %gl_out %outColor
OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; ----- decorations -----
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position

OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal  Location 1
OpDecorate %color   Location 2
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; ----- types -----
%void    = OpTypeVoid
%float   = OpTypeFloat 32
%int     = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint    = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%gl_PerVertex_in  = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float

%uint_1      = OpConstant %uint 1
%arr_pv_in   = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_1

; ----- pointer types -----
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input  %arr_pv_in
%ptr_in_v4     = OpTypePointer Input  %v4float
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input  %v3float

%ptr_out_pv    = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%ptr_out_v4    = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_out_v3    = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void

; ----- constants -----
%int_0        = OpConstant %int   0
%c_half       = OpConstant %float 0.04
%c_zero       = OpConstant %float 0.0
%c_one        = OpConstant %float 1.0

; ----- interface variables -----
%gl_in    = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv  Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3  Input
%normal   = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3  Input
%color    = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3  Input

%gl_out   = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv     Output
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3     Output

; ===== main =====
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%entry = OpLabel

; --- read gl_in[0].gl_Position -------------------------------------------
%pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%pos     = OpLoad %v4float %pos_ptr

; extract x, y from clip-space position
%x = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos 0
%y = OpCompositeExtract %float %pos 1

; compute x±h, y±h
%xm = OpFSub %float %x %c_half          ; x - h
%xp = OpFAdd %float %x %c_half          ; x + h
%ym = OpFSub %float %y %c_half          ; y - h
%yp = OpFAdd %float %y %c_half          ; y + h

; --- read color[0] -------------------------------------------------------
%col_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color %int_0
%col     = OpLoad %v3float %col_ptr

; reusable pointer to gl_out.gl_Position
%out_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

; --- vertex 0 : (x-h, y-h, 0, 1) ----------------------------------------
%v0 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %xm %ym %c_zero %c_one
OpStore %out_pos_ptr %v0
OpStore %outColor    %col
OpEmitVertex

; --- vertex 1 : (x+h, y-h, 0, 1) ----------------------------------------
%v1 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %xp %ym %c_zero %c_one
OpStore %out_pos_ptr %v1
OpStore %outColor    %col
OpEmitVertex

; --- vertex 2 : (x-h, y+h, 0, 1) ----------------------------------------
%v2 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %xm %yp %c_zero %c_one
OpStore %out_pos_ptr %v2
OpStore %outColor    %col
OpEmitVertex

; --- vertex 3 : (x+h, y+h, 0, 1) ----------------------------------------
%v3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %xp %yp %c_zero %c_one
OpStore %out_pos_ptr %v3
OpStore %outColor    %col
OpEmitVertex

; --- complete the triangle-strip primitive --------------------------------
OpEndPrimitive

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

[Points to Diamonds] SPIR-V assembly failed: SPIR-V assembly failed:
error: 25: 15: Invalid Opcode name 'OpTypeUInt'

Geometry Shader - Points to Diamonds (points)

View SPIR-V (4324 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
               OpCapability Geometry
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_out %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
               OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
               OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
               OpDecorate %color_in Location 2
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; -------- Types --------
%void       = OpTypeVoid
%float      = OpTypeFloat 32
%int        = OpTypeInt 32 1
%uint       = OpTypeUInt 32
%v3float    = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float    = OpTypeVector %float 4

; -------- Constants --------
%uint_1     = OpConstant %uint 1
%int_0      = OpConstant %int 0
%float_h    = OpConstant %float 0.05

; -------- Structs --------
%gl_PerVertex_in  = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float

; -------- Arrays --------
%arr_pv_in  = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_1
%arr_v3_in  = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1

; -------- Pointer types --------
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_in
%ptr_in_v4     = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_in_v3     = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_out_pv    = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%ptr_out_v4    = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_out_v3    = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

; -------- Function type --------
%func_type     = OpTypeFunction %void

; -------- Interface variables --------
%gl_in       = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%normal_in   = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%color_in    = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
%gl_out      = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
%outColor    = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output

; ========================================
; Main function
; ========================================
%main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
%bb   = OpLabel

; --- Load gl_in[0].gl_Position ---
%pos_ptr  = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
%orig_pos = OpLoad %v4float %pos_ptr

; --- Extract x, y, z, w ---
%x = OpCompositeExtract %float %orig_pos 0
%y = OpCompositeExtract %float %orig_pos 1
%z = OpCompositeExtract %float %orig_pos 2
%w = OpCompositeExtract %float %orig_pos 3

; --- Precompute offsets ---
%y_plus_h  = OpFAdd %float %y %float_h
%y_minus_h = OpFSub %float %y %float_h
%x_plus_h  = OpFAdd %float %x %float_h
%x_minus_h = OpFSub %float %x %float_h

; --- Load input color from color_in[0] ---
%col_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color_in %int_0
%color   = OpLoad %v3float %col_ptr

; --- Pointer to gl_out.gl_Position (reused for every vertex) ---
%out_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

; =============================
; Vertex 0 – Top    (x, y+h, z, w)
; =============================
%pos_top = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x %y_plus_h %z %w
           OpStore %out_pos_ptr %pos_top
           OpStore %outColor %color
           OpEmitVertex

; =============================
; Vertex 1 – Right  (x+h, y, z, w)
; =============================
%pos_right = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_plus_h %y %z %w
            OpStore %out_pos_ptr %pos_right
            OpStore %outColor %color
            OpEmitVertex

; =============================
; Vertex 2 – Left   (x-h, y, z, w)
; =============================
%pos_left = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x_minus_h %y %z %w
           OpStore %out_pos_ptr %pos_left
           OpStore %outColor %color
           OpEmitVertex

; =============================
; Vertex 3 – Bottom (x, y-h, z, w)
; =============================
%pos_bottom = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %x %y_minus_h %z %w
             OpStore %out_pos_ptr %pos_bottom
             OpStore %outColor %color
             OpEmitVertex

; --- Complete the triangle strip ---
OpEndPrimitive
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Points to Hexagons (points)

View SPIR-V (5694 chars)
               OpCapability Geometry
               OpCapability Shader
         %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_out %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main InputPoints
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 18
               OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; === Decorations ===
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0
               OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1
               OpDecorate %color_in Location 2
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; === Types ===
       %void = OpTypeVoid
%func_type = OpTypeFunction %void
      %bool = OpTypeBool
      %int = OpTypeInt 32 1
     %uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
    %float = OpTypeFloat 32
  %v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
  %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
  %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

; === Constants ===
    %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
    %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
    %int_6 = OpConstant %int 6
   %uint_1 = OpConstant %uint 1
%float_0_04 = OpConstant %float 0.04
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_pi_3 = OpConstant %float 1.0471975512

; === Struct types ===
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
    %arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_1
     %arr_v3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_1

; === Pointer types ===
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
%ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3
%ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_out_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
%ptr_func_int = OpTypePointer Function %int

; === Interface variables ===
     %gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
  %normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
   %color_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
    %gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
   %outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output

; === Main function ===
      %main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
     %entry = OpLabel

; Load center position: gl_in[0].gl_Position
%ptr_center_pos = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
  %center_pos = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_center_pos

; Load center color: color_in[0]
%ptr_center_col = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color_in %int_0
 %center_color = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_center_col

; Darker color for edge vertices (70% brightness)
  %dark_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %center_color %float_0_7

; Extract center x y for offset computation
 %center_xy = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %center_pos %center_pos 0 1
 %center_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos 2
 %center_w = OpCompositeExtract %float %center_pos 3

; Output gl_Position pointer (reused every emit)
%ptr_out_pos = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

; Loop counter variable
    %i_ptr = OpVariable %ptr_func_int Function
         OpStore %i_ptr %int_0
         OpBranch %loop_header

; --- Loop header ---
%loop_header = OpLabel
   %i_val = OpLoad %int %i_ptr
  %i_lt_6 = OpSLessThan %bool %i_val %int_6
  OpBranchConditional %i_lt_6 %loop_body %loop_merge

; --- Loop body ---
%loop_body = OpLabel

; ---- Compute edge vertex 1 ----
; angle1 = float(i) * (PI / 3)
  %i_float = OpConvertSToF %float %i_val
   %angle1 = OpFMul %float %i_float %float_pi_3
    %cos1 = OpExtInst %float %1 Cos %angle1
    %sin1 = OpExtInst %float %1 Sin %angle1
; offset = radius * (cos, sin)
    %ox1 = OpFMul %float %float_0_04 %cos1
    %oy1 = OpFMul %float %float_0_04 %sin1
 %e1_off = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %ox1 %oy1
; edge1_xy = center_xy + offset
   %e1_xy = OpFAdd %v2float %center_xy %e1_off
    %e1_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %e1_xy 0
    %e1_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %e1_xy 1
  %e1_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %e1_x %e1_y %center_z %center_w

; ---- Compute edge vertex 2 (j = (i+1) % 6) ----
   %j_val = OpIAdd %int %i_val %int_1
  %j_eq_6 = OpIEqual %bool %j_val %int_6
 %j_wrap = OpSelect %int %j_eq_6 %int_0 %j_val

  %j_float = OpConvertSToF %float %j_wrap
   %angle2 = OpFMul %float %j_float %float_pi_3
    %cos2 = OpExtInst %float %1 Cos %angle2
    %sin2 = OpExtInst %float %1 Sin %angle2
    %ox2 = OpFMul %float %float_0_04 %cos2
    %oy2 = OpFMul %float %float_0_04 %sin2
 %e2_off = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %ox2 %oy2
   %e2_xy = OpFAdd %v2float %center_xy %e2_off
    %e2_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %e2_xy 0
    %e2_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %e2_xy 1
  %e2_pos = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %e2_x %e2_y %center_z %center_w

; ---- Emit triangle strip: center, edge1, edge2 ----
; Vertex 0: center (full color)
         OpStore %ptr_out_pos %center_pos
         OpStore %outColor %center_color
         OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 1: edge1 (dark color)
         OpStore %ptr_out_pos %e1_pos
         OpStore %outColor %dark_color
         OpEmitVertex

; Vertex 2: edge2 (dark color)
         OpStore %ptr_out_pos %e2_pos
         OpStore %outColor %dark_color
         OpEmitVertex

; End this 3-vertex strip (forms one triangle)
         OpEndPrimitive

; ---- Increment and loop ----
    %i_next = OpIAdd %int %i_val %int_1
         OpStore %i_ptr %i_next
         OpBranch %loop_header

; --- Loop merge ---
%loop_merge = OpLabel
         OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Thick Lines (lines)

View SPIR-V (6058 chars)
               OpCapability Geometry
               OpCapability Shader
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %inWorldPos %inNormal %inColor %gl_out %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main InputLines
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 4
               OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

               ; --- decorations ------------------------------------------------
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 Offset 0
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 Offset 0
               OpDecorate %inWorldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %inNormal   Location 1
               OpDecorate %inColor    Location 2
               OpDecorate %outColor   Location 0

               ; --- types ------------------------------------------------------
       %void = OpTypeVoid
     %fn_type = OpTypeFunction %void
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
        %int = OpTypeInt 32 1
       %uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
     %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
     %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
    %uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
   %v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
   %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
   %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
   %float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
  %float_003 = OpConstant %float 0.03

               ; --- gl_PerVertex structs (input / output) ----------------------
%gl_PerVertex_in  = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float

               ; --- per-vertex input arrays (size 2 for InputLines) ------------
 %arr_in_pv = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_2
  %arr_in_v3 = OpTypeArray %v3float        %uint_2

               ; --- pointer types ----------------------------------------------
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input  %arr_in_pv
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input  %arr_in_v3
   %ptr_in_v4  = OpTypePointer Input  %v4float
   %ptr_in_v3  = OpTypePointer Input  %v3float
 %ptr_out_pv   = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
  %ptr_out_v4  = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
  %ptr_out_v3  = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

               ; --- interface variables ----------------------------------------
      %gl_in    = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input          ; gl_in[]
 %inWorldPos    = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input          ; location 0
   %inNormal    = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input          ; location 1
    %inColor    = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input          ; location 2
     %gl_out    = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv   Output         ; gl_PerVertex
   %outColor    = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3   Output         ; location 0

; ===========================================================================
; main
; ===========================================================================
       %main = OpFunction %void None %fn_type
   %entry   = OpLabel

               ; ---- load gl_Position of both line endpoints -------------------
 %p0_ptr     = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
 %p0         = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr

 %p1_ptr     = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
 %p1         = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr

               ; ---- load per-vertex colors ------------------------------------
 %c0_ptr     = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %inColor %int_0
 %c0         = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr

 %c1_ptr     = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %inColor %int_1
 %c1         = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr

               ; ---- direction = p1 - p0 --------------------------------------
 %dir        = OpFSub %v4float %p1 %p0

               ; ---- keep only xy components -----------------------------------
 %dir_xy     = OpVectorShuffle %v2float %dir %dir 0 1

               ; ---- perpendicular = normalize(-dir.y, dir.x) * thickness -----
 %dir_x      = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir_xy 0
 %dir_y      = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir_xy 1
 %neg_dir_y  = OpFNegate %float %dir_y
 %perp_raw   = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %neg_dir_y %dir_x
 %perp_norm  = OpExtInst %v2float %1 Normalize %perp_raw
 %perp       = OpExtInst %v2float %1 VectorTimesScalar %perp_norm %float_003

               ; ---- build vec4 offsets (+perp and -perp) ----------------------
 %perp_x     = OpCompositeExtract %float %perp 0
 %perp_y     = OpCompositeExtract %float %perp 1
 %neg_px     = OpFNegate %float %perp_x
 %neg_py     = OpFNegate %float %perp_y

 %perp_v4    = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %perp_x %perp_y %float_0 %float_0
 %neg_perp_v4= OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %neg_px %neg_py %float_0 %float_0

               ; ---- quad vertex positions -------------------------------------
 %v0_pos     = OpFAdd %v4float %p0 %perp_v4       ; p0 + perp
 %v1_pos     = OpFAdd %v4float %p0 %neg_perp_v4   ; p0 - perp
 %v2_pos     = OpFAdd %v4float %p1 %perp_v4       ; p1 + perp
 %v3_pos     = OpFAdd %v4float %p1 %neg_perp_v4   ; p1 - perp

               ; ---- pointer to gl_out.gl_Position ----------------------------
 %pos_ptr    = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

               ; ---- emit triangle-strip quad ---------------------------------
               ; vertex 0: p0 + perp, color = c0
               OpStore %pos_ptr %v0_pos
               OpStore %outColor %c0
               OpEmitVertex

               ; vertex 1: p0 - perp, color = c0
               OpStore %pos_ptr %v1_pos
               OpStore %outColor %c0
               OpEmitVertex

               ; vertex 2: p1 + perp, color = c1
               OpStore %pos_ptr %v2_pos
               OpStore %outColor %c1
               OpEmitVertex

               ; vertex 3: p1 - perp, color = c1
               OpStore %pos_ptr %v3_pos
               OpStore %outColor %c1
               OpEmitVertex

               OpEndPrimitive
               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

Geometry Shader - Arrow Lines (lines)

View SPIR-V (6581 chars)
               OpCapability Geometry
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %worldPos_in %normal_in %color_in %gl_out %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main InputLines
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 7
               OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1
               OpSource GLSL 450

; ---- Extended instruction set ----
         %ext = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"

; ---- Debug names ----
               OpName %main "main"
               OpName %gl_PerVertex_in "gl_PerVertex"
               OpName %gl_PerVertex_out "gl_PerVertex"
               OpName %gl_in "gl_in"
               OpName %worldPos_in "worldPos"
               OpName %normal_in "normal"
               OpName %color_in "color"
               OpName %gl_out "gl_out"
               OpName %outColor "outColor"

; ---- Base types ----
       %void = OpTypeVoid
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
    %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
        %int = OpTypeInt 32 1
       %uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

; ---- Constants ----
      %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
      %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
     %uint_2 = OpConstant %uint 2
    %float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
    %float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
 %float_075 = OpConstant %float 0.75
  %float_015 = OpConstant %float 0.015
   %float_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05

; ---- gl_PerVertex input block ----
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 Offset 0

  %arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_2
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
       %gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; ---- gl_PerVertex output block ----
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 Offset 0

  %ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
      %gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output

; ---- User inputs (per-vertex arrays, size 2 for InputLines) ----
   %arr_v3_2 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_2
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_2

%worldPos_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
               OpDecorate %worldPos_in Location 0

 %normal_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
               OpDecorate %normal_in Location 1

  %color_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
               OpDecorate %color_in Location 2

; ---- User output ----
 %ptr_out_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
   %outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; ---- Pointer types for element access ----
  %ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
 %ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; ---- Function ----
  %func_ty = OpTypeFunction %void
       %main = OpFunction %void None %func_ty
      %entry = OpLabel

; ================ LOAD INPUTS ================

; worldPos[0], worldPos[1]
 %p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %worldPos_in %int_0
       %p0 = OpLoad %v3float %p0_ptr
 %p1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %worldPos_in %int_1
       %p1 = OpLoad %v3float %p1_ptr

; color[0], color[1]
 %c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color_in %int_0
       %c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr
 %c1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %color_in %int_1
       %c1 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr

; ================ GEOMETRY COMPUTATION ================

; dir = p1 - p0
      %dir = OpFSub %v3float %p1 %p0

; Extract dir.x, dir.y for 2D perpendicular
   %dir_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir 0
   %dir_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %dir 1

; perp = normalize(vec3(-dir.y, dir.x, 0.0))
  %neg_dy = OpFNegate %float %dir_y
 %perp_uv = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %neg_dy %dir_x %float_0
     %perp = OpExtInst %v3float %ext Normalize %perp_uv

; Scaled perpendicular offsets
 %thick_v = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp %float_015
 %arrow_v = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %perp %float_05

; mid = p0 + 0.75 * dir  (arrow start point)
  %dir_75 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %dir %float_075
      %mid = OpFAdd %v3float %p0 %dir_75

; ================ SHAFT VERTICES ================
; Triangle strip: p0±perp*thickness, mid±perp*thickness
    %sv0 = OpFAdd %v3float %p0 %thick_v
    %sv1 = OpFSub %v3float %p0 %thick_v
    %sv2 = OpFAdd %v3float %mid %thick_v
    %sv3 = OpFSub %v3float %mid %thick_v

; ================ ARROW VERTICES ================
; Triangle strip: mid±perp*arrow_width, p1 tip
    %av0 = OpFAdd %v3float %mid %arrow_v
    %av1 = OpFSub %v3float %mid %arrow_v

; ================ OUTPUT POINTER ================
  %out_pos = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

; ================================================
; EMIT SHAFT (triangle strip, 4 vertices, color = c0)
; ================================================

; Shaft vertex 0: p0 + perp*thickness
 %sv0_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %sv0 %float_1
           OpStore %out_pos %sv0_v4
           OpStore %outColor %c0
           OpEmitVertex

; Shaft vertex 1: p0 - perp*thickness
 %sv1_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %sv1 %float_1
           OpStore %out_pos %sv1_v4
           OpStore %outColor %c0
           OpEmitVertex

; Shaft vertex 2: mid + perp*thickness
 %sv2_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %sv2 %float_1
           OpStore %out_pos %sv2_v4
           OpStore %outColor %c0
           OpEmitVertex

; Shaft vertex 3: mid - perp*thickness
 %sv3_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %sv3 %float_1
           OpStore %out_pos %sv3_v4
           OpStore %outColor %c0
           OpEmitVertex

           OpEndPrimitive

; ==================================================
; EMIT ARROWHEAD (triangle strip, 3 vertices, color = c1)
; ==================================================

; Arrow vertex 0: mid + perp*arrow_width
 %av0_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %av0 %float_1
           OpStore %out_pos %av0_v4
           OpStore %outColor %c1
           OpEmitVertex

; Arrow vertex 1: mid - perp*arrow_width
 %av1_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %av1 %float_1
           OpStore %out_pos %av1_v4
           OpStore %outColor %c1
           OpEmitVertex

; Arrow vertex 2: p1 (tip)
  %p1_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %p1 %float_1
           OpStore %out_pos %p1_v4
           OpStore %outColor %c1
           OpEmitVertex

           OpEndPrimitive

           OpReturn
           OpFunctionEnd

               OpCapability Geometry
               OpCapability Shader
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %gl_out %inWorldPos %inNormal %inColor %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main Triangles
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
               OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; ----- Types -----
       %void = OpTypeVoid
      %func = OpTypeFunction %void
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
        %int = OpTypeInt 32 1
       %uint = OpTypeUInt 32
     %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
     %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3

; ----- Constants -----
     %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
     %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
     %int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
    %uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3

; ----- gl_PerVertex input (Block: Position) -----
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 Offset 0

  %arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_3
               OpDecorate %arr_pv_in ArrayStride 16
%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
      %gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input

; ----- gl_PerVertex output (Block: Position) -----
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 Offset 0

%ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
     %gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output

; ----- User-defined per-vertex input arrays (size 3 for Triangles) -----
    %arr_v3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_3
               OpDecorate %arr_v3 ArrayStride 12
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3

 %inWorldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
               OpDecorate %inWorldPos Location 0
  %inNormal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
               OpDecorate %inNormal Location 1
   %inColor = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
               OpDecorate %inColor Location 2

; ----- User-defined per-vertex output -----
%ptr_out_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float
  %outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; ----- Pointer types used by access chains -----
 %ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
%ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
 %ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float

; ================================================================
;                       Main function
; ================================================================
       %main = OpFunction %void None %func
 %main_bb = OpLabel

; ---- Pre-compute the persistent output pointer for gl_Position ----
%out_pos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

; ===================== Vertex 0 =====================
  %in_pos0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
  %val_pos0 = OpLoad %v4float %in_pos0
               OpStore %out_pos_ptr %val_pos0

  %in_col0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %inColor %int_0
  %val_col0 = OpLoad %v3float %in_col0
               OpStore %outColor %val_col0
               OpEmitVertex

; ===================== Vertex 1 =====================
  %in_pos1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
  %val_pos1 = OpLoad %v4float %in_pos1
               OpStore %out_pos_ptr %val_pos1

  %in_col1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %inColor %int_1
  %val_col1 = OpLoad %v3float %in_col1
               OpStore %outColor %val_col1
               OpEmitVertex

; ===================== Vertex 2 =====================
  %in_pos2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
  %val_pos2 = OpLoad %v4float %in_pos2
               OpStore %out_pos_ptr %val_pos2

  %in_col2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %inColor %int_2
  %val_col2 = OpLoad %v3float %in_col2
               OpStore %outColor %val_col2
               OpEmitVertex

; ---- End the triangle strip (1 triangle from 3 vertices) ----
               OpEndPrimitive

               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Khronos SPIR-V Tools Assembler
; Bound: 80
; Schema: 0
               OpCapability Geometry
          %1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
               OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %inWorldPos %inNormal %inColor %gl_out %outColor
               OpExecutionMode %main Triangles
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputTriangleStrip
               OpExecutionMode %main OutputVertices 3
               OpExecutionMode %main Invocations 1

; ---------- decorations ----------
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %inWorldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %inNormal Location 1
               OpDecorate %inColor Location 2
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; ---------- types ----------
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
    %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
       %uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
        %int = OpTypeInt 32 1
      %void = OpTypeVoid

; ---------- constants ----------
     %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
     %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
     %int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
   %uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
   %float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%float_0_08 = OpConstant %float 0.08
  %float_3 = OpConstant %float 3.0

; ---------- struct / array / pointer types ----------
%gl_PerVertex_in  = OpTypeStruct %v4float
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float

 %arr_pv_in  = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_3
%arr_v3float = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_3

%ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
   %ptr_in_v4  = OpTypePointer Input %v4float
 %ptr_out_pv   = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
   %ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3float
   %ptr_in_v3  = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
  %ptr_out_v3  = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

   %fn_type = OpTypeFunction %void

; ---------- interface variables ----------
      %gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
 %inWorldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
   %inNormal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
    %inColor = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
     %gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
   %outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output

; =====================================================================
; main
; =====================================================================
       %main = OpFunction %void None %fn_type
     %entry = OpLabel

; ---- load gl_Position from the 3 input vertices ----
    %p0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
    %p1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
    %p2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
        %p0 = OpLoad %v4float %p0_ptr
        %p1 = OpLoad %v4float %p1_ptr
        %p2 = OpLoad %v4float %p2_ptr

; ---- swizzle to vec3 (xyz) for the normal calculation ----
    %p0xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p0 %p0 0 1 2
    %p1xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p1 %p1 0 1 2
    %p2xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %p2 %p2 0 1 2

; ---- face normal = normalize(cross(e1, e2)) ----
       %e1 = OpFSub %v3float %p1xyz %p0xyz
       %e2 = OpFSub %v3float %p2xyz %p0xyz
    %cross = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Cross %e1 %e2
        %N = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %cross

; ---- offset = N * 0.08, repacked into vec4(offset, 0.0) ----
   %offset = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %N %float_0_08
      %ox = OpCompositeExtract %float %offset 0
      %oy = OpCompositeExtract %float %offset 1
      %oz = OpCompositeExtract %float %offset 2
   %off_v4 = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %ox %oy %oz %float_0

; ---- reusable pointer to gl_out.gl_Position ----
    %out_p = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

; ========== emit vertex 0 ==========
   %new_p0 = OpFAdd %v4float %p0 %off_v4
             OpStore %out_p %new_p0
    %c0_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %inColor %int_0
        %c0 = OpLoad %v3float %c0_ptr
             OpStore %outColor %c0
             OpEmitVertex

; ========== emit vertex 1 ==========
   %new_p1 = OpFAdd %v4float %p1 %off_v4
             OpStore %out_p %new_p1
    %c1_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %inColor %int_1
        %c1 = OpLoad %v3float %c1_ptr
             OpStore %outColor %c1
             OpEmitVertex

; ========== emit vertex 2 ==========
   %new_p2 = OpFAdd %v4float %p2 %off_v4
             OpStore %out_p %new_p2
    %c2_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %inColor %int_2
        %c2 = OpLoad %v3float %c2_ptr
             OpStore %outColor %c2
             OpEmitVertex

             OpEndPrimitive
             OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V 1.0
               OpCapability Geometry

               OpEntryPoint Geometry %main "main" %gl_in %in_worldPos %in_normal %in_color %gl_out %outColor

; ---- Names ----

               OpName %in_worldPos "worldPos"
               OpName %in_normal "normal"
               OpName %in_color "color"
               OpName %gl_out "gl_out"
               OpName %outColor "outColor"

; ---- Decorations ----
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_in 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out Block
               OpMemberDecorate %gl_PerVertex_out 0 BuiltIn Position
               OpDecorate %in_worldPos Location 0
               OpDecorate %in_normal Location 1
               OpDecorate %in_color Location 2
               OpDecorate %outColor Location 0

; ---- Types ----
       %void = OpTypeVoid
      %float = OpTypeFloat 32
    %v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
    %v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
       %uint = OpTypeUInt 32
        %int = OpTypeInt 32 1

; ---- Constants ----
     %uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
      %int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
      %int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
      %int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
   %float_3 = OpConstant %float 3.0
   %float_s = OpConstant %float 0.7
      %v4_3 = OpConstantComposite %v4float %float_3 %float_3 %float_3 %float_3

; ---- gl_PerVertex input block (array of 3) ----
%gl_PerVertex_in = OpTypeStruct %v4float
    %arr_pv_in = OpTypeArray %gl_PerVertex_in %uint_3
 %ptr_in_arr_pv = OpTypePointer Input %arr_pv_in
    %ptr_in_v4 = OpTypePointer Input %v4float

; ---- gl_PerVertex output block ----
%gl_PerVertex_out = OpTypeStruct %v4float
 %ptr_out_pv = OpTypePointer Output %gl_PerVertex_out
   %ptr_out_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float

; ---- Input / output vec3 arrays ----
    %arr_v3_3 = OpTypeArray %v3float %uint_3
%ptr_in_arr_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %arr_v3_3
   %ptr_in_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
  %ptr_out_v3 = OpTypePointer Output %v3float

; ---- Function type ----
   %func_type = OpTypeFunction %void

; ---- Interface variables ----
      %gl_in = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_pv Input
%in_worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
  %in_normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
   %in_color = OpVariable %ptr_in_arr_v3 Input
     %gl_out = OpVariable %ptr_out_pv Output
  %outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v3 Output

; ======== main ========
       %main = OpFunction %void None %func_type
      %entry = OpLabel

; ---- Load the 3 input gl_Position values ----
    %ptr_p0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_0 %int_0
        %p0 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_p0
    %ptr_p1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_1 %int_0
        %p1 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_p1
    %ptr_p2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v4 %gl_in %int_2 %int_0
        %p2 = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_p2

; ---- Centroid: C = (p0 + p1 + p2) / 3 ----
      %sum1 = OpFAdd %v4float %p0 %p1
      %sum2 = OpFAdd %v4float %sum1 %p2
  %centroid = OpFDiv %v4float %sum2 %v4_3

; ---- Pre-compute output pointer (reused for each vertex) ----
   %out_pos = OpAccessChain %ptr_out_v4 %gl_out %int_0

; ---- Emit vertex 0: new_pos = C + 0.7*(p0 - C) ----
    %diff_0 = OpFSub %v4float %p0 %centroid
 %scaled_0 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %diff_0 %float_s
    %new_0 = OpFAdd %v4float %centroid %scaled_0
             OpStore %out_pos %new_0
   %ptr_c0 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %in_color %int_0
     %col0 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_c0
             OpStore %outColor %col0
             OpEmitVertex

; ---- Emit vertex 1: new_pos = C + 0.7*(p1 - C) ----
    %diff_1 = OpFSub %v4float %p1 %centroid
 %scaled_1 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %diff_1 %float_s
    %new_1 = OpFAdd %v4float %centroid %scaled_1
             OpStore %out_pos %new_1
   %ptr_c1 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %in_color %int_1
     %col1 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_c1
             OpStore %outColor %col1
             OpEmitVertex

; ---- Emit vertex 2: new_pos = C + 0.7*(p2 - C) ----
    %diff_2 = OpFSub %v4float %p2 %centroid
 %scaled_2 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v4float %diff_2 %float_s
    %new_2 = OpFAdd %v4float %centroid %scaled_2
             OpStore %out_pos %new_2
   %ptr_c2 = OpAccessChain %ptr_in_v3 %in_color %int_2
     %col2 = OpLoad %v3float %ptr_c2
             OpStore %outColor %col2
             OpEmitVertex

; ---- End the triangle strip (1 triangle, 3 vertices) ----
             OpEndPrimitive
             OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd
